name: @forgeax/app-learn-render-6-pbr-3-ibl-specular
description: learn-render LearnOpenGL section 6.pbr 3.ibl-specular -- IBL diffuse + specular split-sum sphere matrix via @forgeax/engine-app + Skylight component.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime size already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: OOS-11 fps anchor stays on hello-triangle; per-app fps drift is not gated for learn-render examples

bench.reason: pixel-parity bench drives parity-forgeax vs parity-threejs; learn-render entries land as bench:pixel-parity placeholders only

gate.reason: smoke driver currently fails (meanAbsDelta=0.06246 > threshold=0.05) on macOS dawn locally and Linux dawn in CI; reference PNG was baked at an earlier stage of M5 before the IBL specular convolution + LD lookup chain settled. Re-baking the reference + cross-GPU threshold calibration is a feat-scope follow-up. The smoke command itself is still runnable via `pnpm -F @forgeax/app-learn-render-6-pbr-3-ibl-specular smoke` for local verification.

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; LearnOpenGL section-6.2 IBL specular demo
